6:
WITH totals AS (
    SELECT
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumers AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM totals
    GROUP BY Segment
),
min_totals AS (
    SELECT
        t.Segment,
        t.total_consumption
    FROM totals t
    JOIN min_consumers m
      ON t.Segment = m.Segment
     AND t.total_consumption = m.min_consumption
)
SELECT
    (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'SME')
    - (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'LAM')
    - (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
    - (SELECT total_consumption FROM min_totals WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    WITH seg_consumption AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    ),
    seg_pct AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               ((cons2013 - cons2012) / cons2013) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
        FROM seg_consumption
    )
    SELECT Segment, pct_increase FROM seg_pct ORDER BY pct_increase DESC LIMIT 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Segment, pct_increase FROM seg_pct ORDER BY pct_increase ASC LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
